title: Add ability to look up volumes by unambiguous partial name
body:
Fixes #3891

Add the ability to look up volumes based on partial names, so long as the name given is not ambiguous. This is piped into `volume remove` and `volume inspect` so we can use those with short names. It is not piped into `--volume` and `--mount` for `podman run` - a full name will still be required there, as we create volumes that don't exist (IE, changing the behavior would break Docker compatibility).

@baude This is held up on varlink code right now. I think we need to discuss the API for volumes tomorrow - I think we might need breaking changes. Do we know if Cockpit is using the volumes portion of the API?

Removing WIP. Should be ready.

This does come with a breaking change to the Varlink volume remove API - we've added a return. CC @jwhonce

@baude PTAL. Note the Varlink changes in particular - anything we need to do to account for this?
